Stock-specific opportunities exist within a weak tape; focus on locking in gains on winners and trailing SLs aggressively rather than aggressive new admits with VIX rising.",

SL 1065 sits 1.8% below CMP — proper trail-gap discipline. Current SL/target adequate; HOLD-equivalent. No-op MODIFY check: stored SL=1065.16, proposed=1065.16 — actually this is a no-op so converting to HOLD."

SL 3030 sits 0.4% below CMP — TOO TIGHT, violates 1% trail-gap floor (Rule per Day-10 BANDHANBNK lesson). LOOSENING SL — but rules forbid loosening. Keeping SL at 3030 since I cannot widen. Actually wait — guardrails reject SL widening on longs. Cannot fix this; either accept self-stopout risk or EXIT. Given thesis intact (Q4 PAT +24%, defence multibagger, Rs 33,000 Cr corvette pipeline), accept the risk and hold. Reverting to HOLD."

  "watchlist_notes": "RAMCOCEM: BEARISH research (-0.07 modifier), Q4 pending, South India pricing weak — REJECTED for entry. NBCC: BULLISH +0.09, Rs 280 Cr new orders in 3 days, but stock +15% trailing month is extended; also up +8.18% today — chasing into closing hour with VIX rising not optimal, defer to next session for base. SRF/PIDILITIND/POLYCAB/CAMS/BHARATFORG already in book — no add. NUVAMA +19.7% chase rejected. INDUSINDBK governance overhang per Rule 13 — REJECTED. Will reassess in next Market Pulse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified at 61% deployed across 13 CNC holdings spanning Financials (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), FMCG (MARICO), IT (COFORGE), Defence (GRSE), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA), Capital Goods (POLYCAB), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG), and ETF (GOLDBEES). 4 winners (+10%, +8%, +3.7%, +1.6%) all have SLs locking gains; 4 marginal losers (-0.1% to -1.6%) within risk budget. Today's primary discipline test: trail SLs already at appropriate gaps; no panic-tightening that would force self-stopout (per Day-10/Day-12 lessons). VIX +3.43% to 17.19 with Bank Nifty -1.64% argues for caution on new admits in last 70 min of session; the existing book carries the day's exposure. Daily P&L +1.19% (+₹12,037), well within risk budget."
